🏆 Best Paper Award — Committee Portal
● Connecting...
Nomination Rules:   Please nominate papers you consider outstanding. You may nominate any number of papers for Best Paper and any PhD-student papers for Best Student Paper. The committee will collectively select 1 Best Paper winner and up to 2 Best Student Paper winners. Use the comment box to explain your reasoning.

Field Balance Overview

Comparing the proportion of each JEL field in the full submission pool vs. in-person accepted papers (excluding organized sessions). Blue bars show in-person accepted count; gray shows total pool.

Action: Mark selected as in Round:

View: filter by Status / Type / Round  —  Action: select checkboxes then choose Emailed or Pending(undo) and click Apply. Round filter is only active when Status = Emailed or All.

🏆 Best Paper Award — Committee Results

Loading committee data...

Program Sessions (Parallel A–F)

Papers grouped into sessions of 3–5 by JEL field. Organized sessions are distributed uniformly across parallel slots. Saturday: Sessions A & B. Sunday: Sessions C–F. Each slot has 10–20 rooms.

✏ Drag papers between sessions, or use the ✕/↗ buttons to remove/move papers. Click session name to rename. Session changes are tracked in the Changes tab.

Unassigned In-Person Papers

These accepted papers are not assigned to any session. Click to add to a session.

Move Paper to Session
